name: ai-web-production
description: AI-native web production pipeline for Claude Code. Runs from brief to structure, Figma MCP handoff, frontend build plan, and validation — for webpages, websites, and web services.

web-product-pipeline.description: Run an AI-native web production pipeline for a webpage, website, or web service from brief to UX structure, design handoff, frontend build plan, and validation.

web-design-handoff.description: Turn a webpage, website, or web service brief into Figma MCP-ready frames, tokens, components, and execution steps.

web-build.description: Convert a webpage, website, or web service spec into a frontend implementation plan, and implement only when a real codebase already exists.

homepage-pipeline.description: Specialized homepage and landing page variant of the web product pipeline.

homepage-figma-handoff.description: Specialized Figma MCP handoff spec for homepage and landing page structure.

homepage-build.description: Specialized frontend build command for homepage scope.

web-production-agent.description: Orchestrates the full web production pipeline from brief intake to frontend planning.

design-handoff-agent.description: Specializes in producing Figma MCP-ready design specs from brief or IA.

brief-intake.description: Validates and structures a web project brief from raw user input.

ia-generator.description: Generates information architecture, sitemap, and user flows from a validated brief.

figma-spec-writer.description: Produces Figma MCP-ready design specs including tokens, components, and copy placeholders.

frontend-planner.description: Produces a frontend implementation plan or scaffold spec from a design and IA.
